name: workshop-artificer
summary: An artificer's cluttered workshop — part smithy, part alchemical bench, part library. Mechanical projects in various stages, schematics pinned to every surface, a few mysterious devices humming.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle, messy zones rather than clean stations

primary_palette.note: twin-bench artificer — mechanical and arcane stations
forge + alchemy hybrid — a tinker with fire
centerpiece project — a large device under construction

story_prompts: mid-breakthrough — artificer at the bench, one device humming, shelves climbed for a reference book
commission — a noble's order on the central bench, three days to finish
explosion aftermath — scorched corner, walls smoking, artificer uninjured but thoughtful
auction prep — finished devices laid out, catalog on the desk

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: focused working light (0.45) with magical accents — arcane sigils glow

anti_patterns: messy is the point — don't grid-align anything, stations should overlap zones
arcane and fire must have at least one cell of buffer — or a burn mark suggests they didn't
don't theme-split the room into 'magic side' and 'smith side' — blend them
